urdu transliteration text: RAHAAN AJAB WAQT THAA AAFAT KI GADI THI
english translation text: Rehan (poet) strange was the hour, a time of calamity

urdu transliteration text:
ISLAAM KI BE-GORO KAFAN LAASH PADI THI
The corpse of Islam lay bare & unburied

KAAM AAGAYAA YUn ZAINABE DILGIR KAA PARDAA
The broken hearted Zainab's veil came through
